---
title: "Part I: Agricultural Risk Management"
---

## Overview

Part I introduces agricultural risk management as a practical framework for identifying, assessing, and managing risks faced by farmers, agribusinesses, consumers, and governments.

The lecture notes follow four groups of tools:

| Tool group | Tools covered |
|---|---|
| On-farm and community-level tools | Climate-smart agriculture, agricultural diversification, asset and income strategies |
| Finance-related tools | Agricultural insurance, weather index insurance, agricultural finance and microfinance |
| Market-related tools | Contract farming, commodity exchanges and futures markets, warehouse receipt systems |
| Government-based tools | Public foodgrain reserves, disaster assistance programs, social protection and safety nets |

## Lectures

1. Understanding Agricultural Risk
2. On-Farm Risk Management Tools
3. Finance-Related Risk Management Tools
4. Market-Related Risk Management Tools
5. Government-Based Risk Management Tools
6. Integrated ARM Plan for Oman
